# Decision records (ADRs)

One row per `NNNN-*.md` in this folder — the catalog of decisions that shaped the project. Number + title come from each file's first heading; status from its `*Status:*` line. Open a record for the full **Context · Decision · Consequences · What stays true**.

| #    | Decision                  | Status   |
|------|---------------------------|----------|
| [0001](0001-initial-direction.md) | Initial project direction | Accepted |

*Add a record only when direction changes — a choice a future session shouldn't silently reverse. After adding one, refresh this index (or just re-run `/project-kit`, which regenerates it).*
